title: Specialized Architectures Path
description: Build fluency in Specialized Architectures inside Neural Networks by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.
featuredTermTitles: Fusion Techniques in Multi-modal Learning Techniques

steps.title: Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCNs)
steps.summary: A type of neural network designed for sequential data. It sits inside Neural Networks / Specialized Architectures. Start after Temporal Network Models.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Fusion Techniques in Multi-modal Learning
steps.summary: Fusion Techniques in Multi-modal Learning belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Specialized Architectures. It sits inside Neural Networks / Specialized Architectures. Start after V-Learning and Model Learning. It opens into Fusion Techniques in Multi-modal Learning Variants and Fusion Techniques in Multi-modal Learning Variants Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.
